title: centaurea hybrida var. rodiei
intro: Centaurea hybrida var. rodiei, commonly known as the Cornflower or Bachelor's Button, is a perennial flowering plant in the daisy family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which have been found to aid in wound healing and reducing swelling. The health benefits of Centaurea hybrida var. rodiei include reducing fever, relieving digestive issues, and providing antioxidant properties. The plant can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
